item.title: Scaffold 1.5.0
item.description:
## Scaffold v1.5.0
### What's New - See the full changelog in Help > Release Notes inside the app.
### Installation 1. Download `Scaffold-1.5.0.dmg` 2. Open the DMG and drag the **Scaffold** folder to **Applications** 3. On first launch, right-click Scaffold.app → **Open** (required once for unsigned builds)
### System Requirements - macOS 13.0 or later - Apple Silicon or Intel
### Notes This is an unsigned build. macOS will show a Gatekeeper warning on first launch — right-click → Open to bypass it.
